prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南综合最低位次分别为5788→4773→5826→5072→6129，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字增大），近3年累计后移约300名；2025年基准约6129名，为近 5年最高位次（最难进）；该校在海南招生计划2021–2023年均为51人，2024年降至48人，2025年再降至47人；2026年计划恢复至51人，较2025年扩招约8. 5%，理论上使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名约第80名（2026年），近年排名稳定在80–83名区间，属中上水平理工类高校；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件通报；2025年声誉亦偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌）；抖音热度排名第77位，评价为“一般”，短视频曝光量中等偏低。整 体声誉信号偏负面，可能轻微抑制高分考生报考意愿；第五轮学科评估中，管理科学与工程获评A级，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；工科整体实力较强，机械、电 气、计算机等专业在行业内认可度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续高热，吸引大量理科考生关注；海南省2026 年高考考生总数约78000人，较2025年67408人增加约15.7%，竞争显著加剧；合肥工业大学位于安徽省，非本省高校，在海南无特殊地域偏好；该校在海南招生占比约0.7%–1.1%（2021–2025年），属外省普通招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025 年基准位次6129名、2026年扩招约8.5%（位次数字增大方向）与海南考生大幅增加约15.7%（竞争加剧方向），扩招效应被考生增量显著抵消，整体竞争加剧；声誉偏负面与专业 热度高形成对冲。预测2026年最低位次约6472名，较2025年小幅后移（更难进），区间5972–6972名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约6472名，区间5972–6972名。位次在区间下限（5972名）以内可重点冲刺一档热门工科专业（计算机、电气、机械）；位次在区间中段（6472名附近）建议以二档专业 为主、一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（6972名）附近建议以三档专业保底，优先考虑数字经济等新兴方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Hainan Comprehensive were 5788 → 4773 → 5826 → 5072 → 6129, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (ranking numbers increasing), with a cumulative shift backward of about 300 places in the past 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 6129, the highest ranking in the past 5 years (most difficult to enter); the university's enrollment plan in Hainan was 51 students from 2021 to 2023, dropped to 48 in 2024, and further dropped to 47 in 2025; the 2026 plan returns to 51 students, an increase of about 8.5% compared to 2025, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th on the Soft Science main list (2026), with stable rankings in the 80–83 range in recent years, belonging to upper-middle level science and engineering universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving reports of academic misconduct; the 2025 reputation is also somewhat negative (popular majors' admission cutoffs plummeted); Douyin popularity ranking is 77th, rated as 'average', with medium-low short video exposure. Overall reputation signals are somewhat negative, potentially slightly suppressing high-scoring candidates' willingness to apply; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A- or above discipline at the university; overall engineering strength is relatively strong, with majors like Mechanical, Electrical, and Computer having high recognition in the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly popular in society, attracting a large number of science students; the total number of college entrance exam takers in Hainan Province in 2026 is about 78,000, an increase of about 15.7% compared to 67,408 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Hefei University of Technology is located in Anhui Province, not a local university, and has no special regional preference in Hainan; the university's enrollment proportion in Hainan is about 0.7%–1.1% (2021–2025), which is a normal enrollment scale for an out-of-province university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 6129, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 8.5% (ranking numbers increasing direction), and the significant increase of about 15.7% in Hainan examinees (competition intensifying direction), the expansion effect is significantly offset by the increase in candidates, leading to overall intensified competition; the somewhat negative reputation and high major popularity form a counterbalance. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 6472, slightly backward compared to 2025 (more difficult to enter), with a range of 5972–6972.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 6472, with a range of 5972–6972. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (5972) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular engineering majors (Computer, Electrical, Mechanical); candidates with rankings around the middle of the range (6472) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors with some sprinting for Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (6972) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, prioritizing emerging directions like Digital Economy.
